name: Simple, Easy Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate in the top of a double boiler over hot, not boiling, water.
2. Remove from heat and stir in remaining ingredients.
3. Spread mixture in a generously buttered 8-inch square pan.
4. Chill for two hours or until firm.
5. Turn fudge out onto a cutting board and cut into squares.
6. Store in tightly covered containers. Makes approximately 49 pieces.
Nutritional analysis per serving: 106.6 calories; 4.4 grams total fat; (2.3 grams saturated fat); 1.4 grams protein; 1.3 grams carbohydrates; 5.1 milligrams cholesterol; 18.4 milligrams sodium.
